description: Woopra is a customer journey analytics platform that collects event, visitor, and session data and provides reporting, profiles, funnels, retention, attribution, and data import/export features. It is used to track product and website activity and analyze user behavior across projects.
summary: Woopra exposes two documented HTTP integration surfaces on woopra.com: a REST API at `https://www.woopra.com/rest/3.10` authenticated with per-user Basic access keys, and an HTTP Tracking API under `https://www.woopra.com/track` whose docs show open tracking requests plus an optional Secure Tracking Basic-auth mode for server-side events.
